[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011111110 7
1 110010011 5
2 110001111 6
3 100010111 5
4 110011011 6
5 101010111 6
6 001010101 4
7 011111110 7

01 000000000 a
12 010001000 2
23 100000010 2
34 000000001 1
45 001101100 4
56 000010000 1
67 000001000 1
70 100000111 4

02 010000000 1
13 110001010 4
24 100000001 2
35 001000100 2
46 001110000 3
57 000010000 1
60 100001111 5
71 000000100 1

03 010000000 1
14 100000001 2
25 001000100 2
36 001010000 2
47 001111000 4
50 100000011 3
61 000000100 1
72 010000000 1

04 000000000 a
15 000001000 1
26 001010000 2
37 001010000 2
40 001101110 5
51 000000000 a
62 010001000 2
73 110000010 3

05 000000000 a
16 000010000 1
27 001010000 2
30 001000101 3
41 001100100 3
52 010000000 1
63 110001010 4
74 100000001 2

06 000010000 1

75 000000100 1

07 000010000 1

21 001000100 2
32 000000000 a
43 010101010 4
54 100000001 2
65 000001100 2
76 000000000 a
